name: Gatekeeper-Governed Module Foundry & Core Platform Completion

canonical_planning_basis.conflict_rule: If this ticket pack conflicts with Phase 5B Plan v10 or higher authority repo sources, stop and report the conflict before execution.

phase_boundary.allowed_phase_scope: Phase 5B implements Gatekeeper-Governed Module Foundry & Core Platform Completion from approved Phase 5A inputs and Phase 5B Plan v10.
forbidden_scope: Phase 6A Golden Module implementation or certification template
Phase 6B+ business modules, business workflows, or business-specific UI
production deployment unless future operational readiness proof is explicitly ticketed
runtime AI features beyond approved governed proxy boundary/stub
Phase 5A policy, ADR, standard, checklist, or handoff document modification
phase_boundary.phase5a_gap_rule: Any discovered Phase 5A gap is a stop condition, not an inline Phase 5B patch.

ticket_quality_rule: Implementation is not stale by itself; tickets become stale. Ticket count is not a split condition. Stale, vague, overlapping, unsafe, or over-broad tickets are split conditions. Each ticket must contain maximum concrete implementation within its approved scope. Exact-file planning is required before edits. Future execution must commit per ticket and stop if scope becomes unsafe or stale.

tier_gate_dependency_rule.no_flat_final_gate: Do not make P5B-GATE depend directly on every prior ticket.
tier_gate_dependency_rule.rollup_chain: P5B-GATE -> P5B-T5-GATE -> P5B-T4-GATE -> P5B-T3-GATE -> P5B-T2-GATE -> P5B-T1-GATE -> Tier 0/Tier 1

tickets.title: Baseline controls, repo-state inventory, source authority map
tickets.objective: Deliver Baseline controls, repo-state inventory, source authority map for Phase 5B without exceeding the approved exact-file scope.
scope: Complete P5B-000 - Baseline controls, repo-state inventory, source authority map within Phase 5B scope only.
Use the exact files_expected_to_change list for implementation and evidence.
Meet the minimum concrete requirement: Scoped behavior for Baseline controls, repo-state inventory, source authority map is implemented in exact files and passes repo-real validation.
non_scope: Do not execute Phase 5C frontend excellence work.
Do not implement Phase 6A Golden Module or certification template work.
Do not create Phase 6B+ business modules, business workflows, or business-specific UI.
Do not implement marketplace/public module store work.
Do not implement real production external adapters or production deployment.
Do not access secrets or production credentials.
Do not implement runtime AI beyond the approved governed proxy boundary/stub.
Do not modify Phase 5A policy, ADR, standard, checklist, or handoff documents.
Do not broaden files beyond the exact-file plan without approved conditional replan.
files_forbidden_to_change: generated/entity-registry.generated.json unless exact schema/registry drift authority is present in this ticket
prisma/entity-registry.metadata.json unless exact schema/registry drift authority is present in this ticket
real production external adapter integration files
stop_conditions: Stop if exact files/schema/API/MCR cannot be verified from repo truth.
Stop if exact-file plan reveals files_forbidden_to_change are required.
Stop if work requires an architectural decision not present in committed Phase 5A or Phase 5B source documents.
Stop if validation fails after 3 bounded repair attempts.
Stop if work drifts into Phase 5C, Phase 6A, Phase 6B+ business modules, marketplace, production adapters, deployment, secrets, or runtime AI beyond approved proxy/stub scope.
Stop if Phase 5A policy/ADR/standard/checklist documents appear to require modification; report the gap instead.
acceptance_criteria: P5B-000 MCR is fully satisfied: Scoped behavior for Baseline controls, repo-state inventory, source authority map is implemented in exact files and passes repo-real validation.
All files_expected_to_change are implemented or produced exactly as planned, with no forbidden files changed.
All validation_commands pass and are recorded in the evidence artifact.
codex-review/phase5b-gatekeeper-foundry/ticket-artifacts/P5B-000/P5B-000-validation-summary.md exists and summarizes commands, results, changed files, and known gaps.
No Phase 5B boundary, source-of-truth hierarchy, tenant isolation, Gatekeeper, or Foundry ownership rule is weakened.
tickets.commit_message: phase5b: P5B-000 Baseline controls, repo-state inventory, source authority map
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert the P5B-000 commit, restore only the files_expected_to_change for this ticket, and rerun the ticket validation commands plus git diff --check.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Implementation is not stale by itself; this ticket becomes stale if source authority, dependencies, exact files, or validation commands no longer match current main at execution time.
runtime_consistency_chain: Preserve Gatekeeper-before-Foundry, STOP_FOR_REVIEW immutability, tenant isolation, event-envelope, and source-of-truth protections.
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: Scoped behavior for Baseline controls, repo-state inventory, source authority map is implemented in exact files and passes repo-real validation.
split_if: Split if the ticket becomes stale against current repo files and cannot be repaired inside the exact-file plan.
Split if implementation would create more than one runtime subsystem beyond the ticket title and dependencies.
Split if policy interpretation and runtime implementation become mixed without a locked source decision.
Split if file ownership overlaps another active ticket in a way that makes one commit hard to review.
Split if validation spans unrelated ladders not represented by this ticket.
Do not split because ticket count is high, the phase is long, or the queue feels large.
requires_human_approval_if: Exact-file plan requires files_forbidden_to_change.
Architecture, module boundary, Gatekeeper outcome, tenant isolation, or security behavior must change beyond committed source authority.
New dependency, package/lockfile change, destructive migration, production credential access, or deployment is required.
Generated registry or Prisma metadata drift appears without explicit authority.
Phase 5A source gap or contradiction blocks safe execution.

Known open gap at T2-GATE closure: Gatekeeper and Foundry do not yet emit fully compliant Phase 5A event envelopes. Compliance-class event envelope retrofit is covered by P5B-017e (Gatekeeper retrofit) and P5B-017f (Foundry retrofit) in Tier 3. P5B-T2-GATE closes before this retrofit. The gap is intentional and documented. P5B-T3-GATE closure proves envelope compliance. Do not claim full event compliance at T2-GATE review. Audit label: event envelope gap.
